- [ ] Addition to an existing guide (which one? — file path)

## What are the 3–5 main sections it would cover?

1.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The guide is in `/guides/` and follows the style of existing guides (warm tone, no jargon without definition, real examples).
- [ ] It's linked from the README if it covers a major new topic.
- [ ] It includes at least one `<!-- TODO: contribution welcome -->` marker for future contributors.

## Estimated time

30–90 minutes depending on scope.

## Want to work on this?

Comment below to claim it before you start. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full first-PR walkthrough.
